nasb.text: and Arpachshad lived four hundred and three years after he became the father of Shelah, and he had other sons and daughters.

esv.text: And Arpachshad lived after he fathered Shelah 403 years and had other sons and daughters.

cnv.text: 亞法撒生沙拉以後，又活了四百零三年，並且生了其他的兒女。

ccb.text: 之后又活了四百零三年，生儿育女。

csbs.text: 亚法撒生了萨勒之后，又活了四百零三年，并且生了其他的儿女。
